After skill bonuses are calculated this number restricts the additional skills the player can give his or her character using leftover Skill Points As in the Life Path listed traits gained from age cancel out those diamctricallv opposite For example , character has Toughness but is Vefy Old, he or she loses the Toughness Trait rather than gaining Ihe Glass Jaw Trait The modifiers listed for each age category are not cumula tive: only appl} those for the oldest category reached.

AGE Though the thirty- first century can boast considerable med ical advances humanity has lost much since the davs 0f the first Star League Even tne Clans_ which maintain many tech nologies trom Inat era; have allowed geriatrics to slip into dis use because they value youth and strength above age and wis dom: Despite this, the human Iifespan has been extended t0 the point that the average person can expect tO see his 9oth or 10Oth birthday: By that time_ his or her pnysica and mental con dition are comparable to that 0f seventy- eightyyear old in the twentieth century AII characters end Stage at age ten and end Stage 2 age sixteen.
